prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该校在内蒙古理科（物理类）最低录取位次分别为约3997名、2639名、1957名、3927名、1053名，波动较大。2021年因含本科一批B段低分专业拉低位次，2024年同样因B段专业出现位次后移；2025年改为物理类后仅设本科批，最低位次大幅前移至1053名，为近五年最佳。近两年（2024→2025）位次前移约2874名，趋势明显向好；该校在内蒙古理科/物理类招生计划：2021年55人、2022年49人、2023年49人、2024年49人、2025年51人；2026年计划52人，较2025年增加1人，小幅扩招约2%，对竞争压力略有缓解但影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华中科技大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021–2024年均为第8名，2025年降至第9名，2026年保持第9名，稳居全国Top10，属于顶尖综合性大学；2026年声誉评价为"偏正面"，主要原因包括新闻传播学科全国排名前列、招生透明度高，以及全国高校食堂排名第一（约35个食堂，人均消费8–15元），受到学生好评。抖音热度排名第22位（较热），短视频曝光量较高，反映报考关注度持续升温。历史投档异常记录中未见该校有明显断档或暴跌信号；第五轮学科评估中，A-及以上学科达17个：机械工程A+、光学工程A+、电气工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、控制科学与工程A、动力工程及工程热物理A、材料科学与工程A、物理学A、管理科学与工程A、临床医学A-、公共卫生与预防医学A-、化学A-、基础医学A-、工商管理A-、新闻传播学A-、生物医学工程A-、生物学A-。其中电气工程、机械工程、光学工程、计算机等王牌专业与招生专业高度对应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示：计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化均为"高热推荐"；临床医学、口腔医学为"推荐"；能源动力类为"推荐"；数学/统计为"推荐"。华科在上述领域均拥有A/A+学科，报考吸引力强。内蒙古2026年考生总数154000人，按近年物理类占比约72%估算，物理类考生约110800人，较2025年物理类83716人增加约27000人（+32%），竞争显著加剧。；华中科技大学位于湖北省武汉市，非内蒙古本省高校。2025年在内蒙古招生51人，占该校全国总招生人数比例约0.7%，属于跨省招生中占比偏低的省份，无显著地域偏好优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1053名、2026年招生计划小幅扩招（51→52人，+2%）、2026年内蒙古物理类考生大幅增加（约+32%）、学校声誉偏正面且抖音热度较热等因素：扩招对位次有轻微下拉作用（位次数字增大），但考生规模大幅增长是更主要的影响因素，将推高竞争激烈程度使位次后移；学校声誉正面和优势学科吸引力也会推高报考热度。经权衡，预测2026年最低录取位次约1115名，波动区间988–1242名。

一档（最难进）
- 人工智能（具身交互智能启明实验班）
- 计算机类（计算机学院）
- 电子信息类（电信学院）
- 电气工程及其自动化
- 电子信息类（集成电路学院）
- 光电信息科学与工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 自动化类
- 计算机类（网安学院）
- 数学类
- 能源动力类
- 机械类

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约1115名，区间988–1242名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档为主力报考区间（自动化类、计算机类网安、数学类、能源动力类、机械类、临床医学），一档专业（人工智能实验班、计算机学院、电气工程、光电等）可作为冲刺目标，三档专业（材料类、管理科学与工程类、化学类）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间上限（<988名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间下限（>1242名）建议以三档为主、二档为辅。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the university's minimum admission rankings in Inner Mongolia for science (physics category) were approximately 3997, 2639, 1957, 3927, and 1053 respectively, showing significant fluctuations. In 2021, the inclusion of low-score majors in the first batch B segment lowered the ranking; in 2024, the B segment majors again caused a backward shift; in 2025, after switching to the physics category with only the undergraduate batch, the minimum ranking moved sharply forward to 1053, the best in five years. In the last two years (2024→2025), the ranking moved forward by about 2874 places, showing a clear upward trend. The university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Inner Mongolia: 55 in 2021, 49 in 2022, 49 in 2023, 49 in 2024, 51 in 2025; 52 planned for 2026, an increase of 1 from 2025, a slight expansion of about 2%, which slightly eases competition pressure but has limited impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Huazhong University of Science and Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 8th from 2021 to 2024, dropped to 9th in 2025, and remained 9th in 2026, firmly in the national Top 10, belonging to top-tier comprehensive universities. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is 'somewhat positive', mainly due to its journalism and communication discipline ranking among the top nationally, high admissions transparency, and ranking first in the national university cafeteria rankings (about 35 cafeterias, per capita consumption 8–15 yuan), receiving positive student reviews. Its Douyin popularity ranks 22nd (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, reflecting continuously rising application attention. No obvious discontinuities or sharp drops have been observed in historical admission anomaly records. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 17 disciplines rated A- or above: Mechanical Engineering A+, Optical Engineering A+, Electrical Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Control Science and Engineering A, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Physics A, Management Science and Engineering A, Clinical Medicine A-, Public Health and Preventive Medicine A-, Chemistry A-, Basic Medicine A-, Business Administration A-, Journalism and Communication A-, Biomedical Engineering A-, Biology A-. Among them, flagship majors such as Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Optical Engineering, and Computer Science highly correspond to the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation are all 'highly recommended'; Clinical Medicine and Stomatology are 'recommended'; Energy and Power are 'recommended'; Mathematics/Statistics are 'recommended'. HUST has A/A+ disciplines in these fields, making it highly attractive for applications. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Inner Mongolia is 154,000; estimated at about 72% physics category proportion in recent years, physics category examinees are about 110,800, an increase of about 27,000 (+32%) from 83,716 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Huazhong University of Science and Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei Province, not a local university in Inner Mongolia. In 2025, it enrolled 51 students in Inner Mongolia, accounting for about 0.7% of its total national enrollment, a relatively low proportion among cross-provincial enrollments, with no significant regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1053, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (51→52, +2%), the significant increase in Inner Mongolia physics category examinees in 2026 (about +32%), the somewhat positive university reputation and relatively hot Douyin popularity, etc.: the expansion has a slight downward effect on ranking (ranking number increases), but the substantial growth in examinee scale is the more dominant factor, which will increase competition intensity and push the ranking backward; the positive university reputation and advantageous discipline attractiveness will also boost application popularity. After weighing, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 1115, with a fluctuation range of 988–1242.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 1115, range 988–1242. For rankings within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Automation, Computer Science (School of Cyber Science and Engineering), Mathematics, Energy and Power, Mechanical Engineering, Clinical Medicine) as the main application range; Tier 1 majors (Artificial Intelligence Experimental Class, School of Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Optoelectronics, etc.) can be used as reach targets; Tier 3 majors (Materials Science and Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, Chemistry) serve as safe backups. For rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<988), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; for rankings near the lower limit (>1242), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors supplemented by Tier 2.
